fullHistory.content:
Hey! I'm Roba Copilot — ready to help you build something innovative. Here's what we can do:

🤖 Custom Robot Design
"Add a new wheeled robot with steering and suspension"
"Build a robotic arm and mount it on the four-wheeler"
"Design a three-legged walker from scratch"

⚙️ Physics & Simulation
"Make the four-wheeler drive in a circle automatically"
"Add friction and terrain to the empty room scene"
"Simulate the three-wheeler tipping over on a sharp turn"

🛠️ Build & Experiment
"Add speed and steering controls to the four-wheeler"
"Load my URDF robot into a new scene"
"Put both vehicles in the same scene side by side"
make a 3 wheeler robot and run 10 meter forward
